CheckTitle: Ensure agent identities and blueprints have a designated sponsor
Description: Checks that every agent identity and blueprint has at least one sponsor. Sponsors are the Entra Agent ID native accountability construct that names a responsible party. This is stricter than the owner-or-sponsor accountability check: it requires a sponsor specifically.
Risk: Without a designated sponsor there is no clearly named party responsible for an agent's ongoing review, recertification, and eventual decommissioning. Ownership alone (which may be another application) does not establish human accountability.

Remediation.Recommendation: Assign at least one sponsor to each agent identity and blueprint, ideally a person or group accountable for its lifecycle. Establish a periodic recertification process tied to the sponsor.

SourceNotes: Distinct from entraid_agent_006 (owner OR sponsor). This check requires a sponsor specifically and is LOW severity.
